entries.name: batch-iter-_chunked-recognised
entries.description: `for chunk in _chunked(symbol_ids):` is batch iteration, not N+1.

entries.name: batch-iter-batched-recognised
entries.description: bare `for x in _batched(items):` shape also recognised.

entries.name: batch-iter-where-in-placeholder-recognised
entries.description: f-string `WHERE id IN ({ph})` interpolation hints at batched IN-clause.
entries.input:
ph = ','.join('?' for _ in ids)
rows = conn.execute(f'SELECT * FROM x WHERE id IN ({ph})', ids).fetchall()

entries.name: batch-iter-naive-loop-not-recognised
entries.description: Negative: bare per-item loop must NOT trigger batch suppression.

entries.name: depth-guard-still-fires-with-bigint-bound
entries.description: M2 / regression: depth-guard regex must match `if (depth > 10000) return`.

entries.name: in-memory-pinia-state-receiver
entries.description: M3 + framework: `pinia.state.x.set(k, v)` — pinia receiver allowlisted.
